misc: Waters the course more than the course sprinklers.
biography: Hailing from Espoo Ringside Golf, Pekka is poised for his eighth appearance in the esteemed Hector Trophée at the 2026 edition. A seasoned competitor, he has previously hoisted the coveted Hector Trophée with his partner on one occasion, demonstrating his capability within this unique pair competition format.

While that singular triumph in the team event marks a significant achievement in his tournament history, the individual Victor Trophy remains an objective he fervently seeks. Pekka's approach to the game is often characterized by a bold, aggressive style. This sometimes leads to memorable shots, but equally, a propensity for finding water hazards, a characteristic playfully noted by observers as 'watering the course more than the course sprinklers'.

Still an active participant in Hector events, Pekka’s dedication to the sport and the competitive spirit of the Trophée is undeniable. His presence consistently brings a dynamic energy to the fairways, and he enters the Hector Trophée 2026 with a clear determination to add further accolades to his esteemed record.
